subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the presence of God, the Most Exalted, the Most Great, wherein mention is made of Our servant named Muhammad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله العلی العظیم و یذکر فیه عبدنا الذی سمی بمحمد فی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
